data.title: NewLake Capital Partners Issues Second Quarter 2026 Common Stock Dividend of $0.43 per Share
data.description: On June 12, 2026, NewLake Capital Partners, Inc. declared a cash dividend of $0.43 per share for the second quarter of 2026. This amount equates to an annualized dividend of $1.72 per common share. The dividend is scheduled to be distributed on July 15, 2026, to common stockholders recorded as of the closing of business on June 30, 2026. NewLake is a prominent provider of real estate capital to state-licensed cannabis operators.

US bank deposits fell to $19.296 trln from $19.338 trln in prior week

data.title: Black Hills Corp. Requests Rate Review in Colorado
data.description: Black Hills Corp. disclosed today that its Colorado electric utility, listed under NYSE as BKH, has submitted a rate review application to the Colorado Public Utilities Commission. The application is aimed at recuperating the essential capital infrastructure and operational expenses needed to provide secure, dependable electric service to more than 102,000 customers in Southern Colorado.

data.title: M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. Announces Cancellation of Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders to Approve Business Combination
data.description: On June 12, 2026, M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. (Nasdaq: MBAV), a special purpose acquisition company, made the decision to cancel its extraordinary general meeting of shareholders. This meeting was intended for shareholders to vote on important matters, but it has been called off. The company did not provide a reason for this cancellation. This move comes amidst a period of uncertainty and change in the business world. Shareholders and investors are left awaiting further updates and announcements from the company.

data.title: SEEM Board Meeting and Annual Meeting of Participants and Stakeholders Scheduled on June 24
data.description: On June 24, 2026, at 3 p.m. EST, the board meeting and annual meeting of participants and stakeholders of the Southeast Energy Exchange Market will take place in Atlanta. The event will be streamed live via a webcast of the conference call for all interested parties to attend virtually.

data.title: Target Announces Voting Results from 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: On June 10, 2026, Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) revealed the outcomes of its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders conducted in Minneapolis. At the meeting, all 12 board of directors' nominees were elected by the shareholders. Additionally, the appointment of certain individuals was also ratified.

data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. June 2026 Dividend Announcement and May Financial Update
data.description: On June 12, 2026, Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declared a cash dividend of $0.12 per share for June 2026. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on July 15, 2026 to stockholders of record as of a specified date.

data.title: BNY Announces Redemption of 582,500 Depositary Shares, Each Representing a 1/100th Interest in a Share of its Series H Noncumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock
data.description: On June 12, 2026, the Bank of New York Mellon Corporation (BNY), a leading global financial services company, revealed its plan to repurchase all remaining shares of its Series H Noncumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock (known as the Series H Preferred Stock). This redemption marks a significant move by BNY to consolidate its financial assets. The stock being repurchased holds a substantial value in the market, and the decision is poised to impact the company's standing in the industry.

data.title: 4DMT Announces New Employment Inducement Grants
data.description: On June 9, 2026, 4D Molecular Therapeutics revealed that the compensation committee of its board of directors approved the granting of 66,900 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) to seven new non-executive employees. These RSUs were awarded under the Company's 2025 Employment Inducement Award Plan, as amended. This move falls under Rule 5635(c)(4) of The Nasdaq Global Market, allowing for equity grants to attract new employees to join the organization. 4D Molecular Therapeutics, a prominent late-stage biotechnology firm, is focused on developing targeted therapeutics that could revolutionize treatment approaches and offer significant advantages to patients.

data.title: Cartesian Therapeutics Announces New Employment Inducement Grant
data.description: Frederick, Maryland - Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: RNAC), a leading biotechnology company focused on cell therapy for autoimmune diseases, recently announced the award of a stock option to a new employee. This option allows the purchase of 6,100 shares of the company’s common stock at an exercise price of $5.86 per share, based on the closing trading price on the Nasdaq Global Market on the day of issuance, June 8, 2026. The option, granted under the 2018 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan, was approved by the board of directors and vests in increments over time, with 25% becoming available on June 8, 2027, and the full amount accessible by June 8, 2030. The option remains valid for ten years and falls under Nasdaq Listing Rules as a material inducement for the employee joining the company.

data.title: Canterbury Park Holding Corporation Announces Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Shakopee, Minnesota on June 12, 2026, Canterbury Park Holding Corporation, publicly traded as CPHC on NASDAQ, disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend of $0.07 per share. The dividend is scheduled to be dispensed on July 14, 2026, to shareholders noted on the record as of June 30, 2026. With this quarterly dividend rate, the yearly dividend approximates $0.28 per common share.

data.title: XOMA Royalty Corporation Declares Quarterly Preferred Stock Dividend and Announces Redemption of Its Perpetual Preferred Stock and CVR Dividend Record Date
data.description: On June 12, 2026, XOMA Royalty Corporation (Nasdaq: XOMA) announced cash dividends for holders of its Series A Preferred Stock (984,000 shares outstanding) and depositary shares representing its Series B Preferred Stock (1,760,500 Depositary Shares). The dividends are authorized by the Board of Directors and will be paid on or after July 14, 2026. Additionally, on the same Redemption Date, all outstanding shares of Preferred Stock will be redeemed in accordance with Section 5(b) of the applicable Certificate of Designation.

data.title: Avista pauses processing of energy service request from 500 MW data center developer while seeking broader policy and community alignment
data.description: The priority is to uphold transparency, ensure protection for customers, and engage with the community in a significant way. These principles are upheld diligently to foster trust among stakeholders and society at large.

data.title: Net Lease Office Properties Announces Postponement of Annual Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: The Board of Directors consistently advises shareholders to support all proposals unanimously. In New York on June 12, 2026, Net Lease Office Properties Inc. (NLOP) conducted its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders at 10:00 am. The company informed about its recommendations for the Annual Meeting without specifying any further details or outcomes.

data.title: Air Canada Welcomes New Collective Agreement Ratified by its Customer Service Employees
data.description: On June 12, 2026, in Montréal, Air Canada announced the successful ratification of a fresh collective bargaining deal with Unifor. This agreement covers around 6,000 workers in various roles including contact centre, customer relations, concierge, airport in-terminal, and customer journey management positions at Air Canada. The newly endorsed four-year agreement will remain valid until February 28, 2030.

data.title: InspireMD Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On June 12, 2026, InspireMD, Inc. (Nasdaq: NSPR) announced that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors approved the granting of 91,161 shares of restricted stock to six new non-executive employees. These shares, known as the "Inducement Grants," were given outside of the company's 2021 Equity Incentive Plan. The grant date for these shares was also June 12, 2026. This decision was made in accordance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) and was considered crucial in attracting the new non-executive employees to work for InspireMD.

data.title: KBRA Assigns A- Rating to City of Columbia, TN Long Term Water Supply Program Project Bonds (WIFIA ID 19133TN)
data.description: In New York, KBRA has assigned a long-term rating of A- with a Stable Outlook to the City of Columbia, TN Long Term Water Supply Program Project Bonds (WIFIA ID 19133TN). This rating was determined based on key credit considerations which include the following factors: a rapidly growing service area population with positive socioeconomic attributes, a strong operating history, and currently low levels of leverage. Additionally, required rate adjustments up to 2030 have already been accounted for.

data.title: SpaceX's Record IPO, Inflation Jumps To Over 3-Year Highs: This Week On Wall Street
data.description: Market volatility escalated on Wall Street as the VIX index surged above 20 for the first time since late April. However, stocks managed to recover losses by Friday, lifting the S&P 500 into positive territory for the week. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) tracked this movement. A potential U.S.–Iran deal coming closer influenced this turnaround. Inflationary concerns intensified with the Consumer Price Index showing a 4.2% year-over-year rise in May, the highest since April 2023. Energy costs surged by 23.5% annually. Producer inflation also surprised, hitting 6.5%, marking the largest annual leap since November 2022. The Federal Reserve's upcoming meeting on June 17, chaired by Kevin Warsh, is highly anticipated. The bond market has entirely factored in a rate hike by the end of the year. Additionally, SpaceX, led by Elon Musk, staged the biggest IPO in history, with Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (NASDAQ: SPCX) making its debut on Friday.
